title: News headline drill
text: Tech giant announces layoffs. Stocks slip on weak data. New album breaks streaming record. Climate deal signed in Geneva today.

tips.text: Capitals at sentence start — Shift practice

tips.target: Tech giant announces layoffs. Stocks slip on weak data. New

tips.text: Each headline ends with period — clean break

tips.target: album breaks streaming record. Climate deal signed in Geneva today.

character_tips.anna: Headline style. Short, punchy, capitals + facts.
character_tips.maxim: News headlines = high-density information at speed.
character_tips.klavochka: Important news of the day, my dear 📺
